svg.title: AXON unified architecture — ADL human layer, AEL LLM layer, MCP wire protocol, provider plugins
svg.desc: Three horizontal layers showing how AXON unifies human-written agent definitions (ADL), LLM-generated execution traces (AEL), and MCP wire protocol, with provider plugins beneath.
svg.text: AXON — the SQL of agentic systems
One language · two reading modes · one wire protocol · open standard

g.text: What humans write · declarative · describe goals, not steps
What LLMs generate · imperative · think/act/observe traces
AXON compiles here · any MCP-compatible client can call AXON servers
Provider plugins — swappable, zero code change

svg.text: ADL = SQL DDL · AEL = SQL DML · MCP = the relational engine below
